headline: FLAG-FOR-REVIEW. Myanmar's published composite is 0 (Critical) but is NOT formally floor-designated. Methodology-conformity scoring suggests anchor 1 across most subdimensions (matches floor pattern) with a small number of 2s warranted (basic state functions in junta-controlled <40% of territory; long-horizon planning frameworks for power retention). Composite delta +6.3 is a methodology adjustment, not a substantive improvement signal. RECOMMENDATION: formal floor-designate Myanmar to align with South Sudan / Sudan / Israel cluster, given April 10 inauguration of Min Aung Hlaing formalizing coup leadership and April 26 martial-law expansion across 60 townships.
key_evidence: April 10 2026: Min Aung Hlaing (coup architect 2021) sworn in as president — closes 'transitional' framing
April 26 2026: Junta imposed martial law across 60 townships following inauguration
9,400+ cumulative airstrikes since coup; 3,800+ civilian deaths from airstrikes alone
4 million internally displaced; 1.5 million refugees; 1/3 of population in humanitarian need
Junta controls fewer than 40% of townships
Pattern matches existing floor-designated cluster (South Sudan, Sudan, Israel)

evidence.finding: Min Aung Hlaing sworn in as president. Bombardments continued during ceremony.
Martial law imposed across 60 townships following presidential inauguration.
Air/drone strikes 3,300+ in 2025-2026; junta controls <40% of townships.
Military's actions amount to war crimes and crimes against humanity.

negativeSignals: April 10 inauguration formalizes coup. April 26 martial-law expansion structural escalation. Pattern is structural-harm-by-design matching floor-designated cluster.
positiveSignals: None substantive. Basic state functions persist in <40% controlled territory.
human_review_question: Should Myanmar be formally floor-designated to align with the existing 5-entity cluster (xAI/Grok, Palantir AI, Sudan, South Sudan, Israel) given the April 10 inauguration consolidating coup leadership and April 26 martial-law expansion? Alternative: accept methodology-conformity 6.3 baseline at Critical band without floor designation.
